title: The Data Exhaustion Limit
concept: As models scale, they consume all high-quality public text data on the internet, requiring research into synthetic data generation.

exercises.prompt: What do large AI models 'eat' to learn how to speak and write like humans?

options.text: Physical textbooks placed on top of the computer

exercises.explain: Just like we need food to grow, AI models require massive amounts of text data (like books and websites) to learn language and reasoning.

cards.title: Running Out of Internet
cards.body: AI models get smarter by reading human text. But what happens when the AI runs out of things to read? We are fast approaching the bottom of the internet's data barrel!

cards.title: Data Exhaustion Limit
cards.body: The Data Exhaustion Limit is the point where AI models run out of new, high-quality public text on the internet to read and learn from. To keep improving, they need new sources of data, like computer-generated 'synthetic data'.

cards.title: The Hungry Book Monster
cards.body: Imagine you are a giant, hungry book monster. You eat every book, blog, and website on Earth until the library is completely empty. To keep growing, you must start writing your own stories to read. AI models have already read almost everything humans have written, so they must now 'write' their own learning material.

cards.title: Running Out of Words
cards.body: Modern AI models like GPT-4 have read trillions of words from Wikipedia, news sites, and forums. Because they have consumed nearly the entire public internet, researchers are now training new AI models using computer-generated math problems and coding puzzles instead of human writing.

cards.title: Myth: The Internet is Infinite
cards.body: It seems logical that the internet will always have new tweets, posts, and blogs for AI to read. However, most daily posts are repetitive or low-quality. High-quality text is a finite resource, and we are consuming it much faster than humans can write it!

cards.title: The Shift in AI Diet
cards.body: We are shifting from using natural human writing to computer-generated training materials as public data runs out.

right.text: High-quality text and math puzzles generated by AI for other AI to learn from.

left.text: Books, blogs, and public forums written by people. Almost completely consumed.

exercises.prompt: Why are AI researchers worried about the 'Data Exhaustion Limit'?

options.text: AI models are consuming all high-quality public text on the internet
Computer hard drives are running out of physical storage space
Humans are stopping write activities altogether
The internet is being shut down by governments

exercises.explain: The data exhaustion limit occurs because AI models are growing so fast that they are running out of high-quality human text to learn from.

exercises.prompt: Synthetic data is artificial data created by computers to help train AI models.
exercises.explain: Synthetic data is artificial data generated by computers, which helps train AI models when human data runs out.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word to describe artificial data.
exercises.sentence: When human text runs out, researchers use computer-generated ______ data to train AI models.
exercises.explain: Synthetic data is created by computer programs to train AI when human-made data runs out.

exercises.prompt: Identify which of these texts is likely synthetic data generated specifically to train a math AI.

options.text: Human: 'Hey, did you see the game last night? That final play was crazy!'
AI: 'Solve the following equation: 3x + 5 = 14. Provide a step-by-step proof.'
Human: 'Ugh, traffic on the way to work today was absolutely terrible.'

exercises.explain: The middle statement is AI-generated (synthetic) text because it is a highly structured, generated math problem designed for training, whereas the others are typical human conversations.

exercises.prompt: AI has officially read almost all public text on the internet. As a lead AI developer, how do you solve this data exhaustion limit to keep training smarter models?

options.text: Shut down the internet to save electricity
Make AI models smaller so they forget what they read
Generate high-quality synthetic data using AI models
Wait for humans to write twice as fast

exercises.explain: When AI runs out of human-written text (reaching the data exhaustion limit), researchers use advanced models to create high-quality synthetic data to continue training.
